title: ChatAnthropic in streaming output scenarios, usage input_tokens is always 0

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Related to a bug, vulnerability, unexpected error with an existing feature

body:
### Checked other resources

- [x] This is a bug, not a usage question.
- [x] I added a clear and descriptive title that summarizes this issue.
- [x] I used the GitHub search to find a similar question and didn't find it.
- [x] I am sure that this is a bug in LangChain rather than my code.
- [x] The bug is not resolved by updating to the latest stable version of LangChain (or the specific integration package).
- [x] This is not related to the langchain-community package.
- [x] I posted a self-contained, minimal, reproducible example. A maintainer can copy it and run it AS IS.

### Package (Required)

- [ ] langchain
- [ ] langchain-openai
- [x] langchain-anthropic
- [ ] langchain-classic
- [ ] langchain-core
- [ ] langchain-model-profiles
- [ ] langchain-tests
- [ ] langchain-text-splitters
- [ ] langchain-chroma
- [ ] langchain-deepseek
- [ ] langchain-exa
- [ ] langchain-fireworks
- [ ] langchain-groq
- [ ] langchain-huggingface
- [ ] langchain-mistralai
- [ ] langchain-nomic
- [ ] langchain-ollama
- [ ] langchain-openrouter
- [ ] langchain-perplexity
- [ ] langchain-qdrant
- [ ] langchain-xai
- [ ] Other / not sure / general

### Related Issues / PRs

_No response_

### Reproduction Steps / Example Code (Python)

```python
import asyncio

from langchain_anthropic import ChatAnthropic
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatAnthropic(
    model="us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929-v1:0",
    streaming=True,
    stream_usage=True
)


async def main():
    messages = [
        HumanMessage(
            content="你好"
        ),
    ]

    print("=== astream_events 流式输出 ===\n")

    async for event in llm.astream_events(messages, version="v2"):
        kind = event["event"]

        # 流式输出 token
        if kind == "on_chat_model_stream":
            chunk = event["data"]["chunk"]
            if chunk.content:
                print(chunk.content, end="", flush=True)

        # 模型调用结束，打印 usage
        elif kind == "on_chat_model_end":
            output = event["data"]["output"]
            metadata = output.response_metadata or {}
            usage = metadata.get("usage", {})
            cache = usage.get("cache_creation", {})

            print("\n")
            print(f"usage_metadata: {output.usage_metadata}")
            print(f"input_tokens: {usage.get('input_tokens')}")
            print(f"output_tokens: {usage.get('output_tokens')}")
            print(f"cache_read_input_tokens: {usage.get('cache_read_input_tokens')}")
            print(f"cache_creation_input_tokens: {usage.get('cache_creation_input_tokens')}")
            print(f"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens: {cache.get('ephemeral_5m_input_tokens')}")
            print(f"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens: {cache.get('ephemeral_1h_input_tokens')}")


asyncio.run(main())
```

### Error Message and Stack Trace (if applicable)

```shell

```

### Description

ChatAnthropic in streaming output scenarios, usage input_tokens is always 0

usage_metadata: {'input_tokens': 0, 'output_tokens': 29, 'total_tokens': 29, 'input_token_details': {}}
input_tokens: None
output_tokens: None
cache_read_input_tokens: None
cache_creation_input_tokens: None
ephemeral_5m_input_tokens: None
ephemeral_1h_input_tokens: None

## claude code fix
● Update(.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/langchain_anthropic/chat_models.py)          
  ⎿  Added 7 lines, removed 2 lines                                                      
      1996      # Reference: Anthropic SDK streaming implementation                      
      1997      # https://github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python/blob/main/src       
            /anthropic/lib/streaming/_messages.py  # noqa: E501                          
      1998      if event.type == "message_start" and stream_usage:                       
      1999 -        # Capture model name, but don't include usage_metadata yet           
      2000 -        # as it will be properly reported in message_delta with comple     
           -te info                                                                      
      1999          if hasattr(event.message, "model"):                                  
      2000              response_metadata: dict[str, Any] = {"model_name": event.m       
            essage.model}                                                                
      2001          else:                                                                
      2002              response_metadata = {}
      2003  
      2004 +        # Include input_tokens from message_start, as message_delta   
      2005 +        # only contains output_tokens.                                
      2006 +        usage_metadata = None                                         
      2007 +        if hasattr(event.message, "usage") and event.message.usage is 
           +not None:                                                             
      2008 +            usage_metadata = _create_usage_metadata(event.message.usag
           +e)                                                                    
      2009 +                                                                      
      2010          message_chunk = AIMessageChunk(
      2011              content="" if coerce_content_to_string else [],
      2012              response_metadata=response_metadata,
      2013 +            **({"usage_metadata": usage_metadata} if usage_metadata el
           +se {}),                                                               
      2014          )
      2015  
      2016      elif (
